acceptance.claim: The sync screen shows repositories after authorization, lets the user choose a repository and branch, tap Sync, and see a success state.
The GitHub catalog API fetches authenticated repositories and maps owner, name, visibility, default branch, and URL fields.
The GitHub catalog API fetches repository branches and maps branch names.
The directory sync BLoC builds sync requests from the selected repository and branch instead of a typed remote URL.
Dependency injection uses the fixture catalog in dev and the GitHub API catalog outside dev fixtures.
